claims.statement: Channel Tunnel length is at least 5× larger than Appalachian Trail length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km. Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km.

claims.statement: Speed of sound in air (~20°C) is slower than Speed of sound in water.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Speed of sound in air (~20°C): 1235 km/h. Speed of sound in water: 5328 km/h.

claims.statement: Seikan Tunnel length is longer than Great Barrier Reef length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km. Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer squares on a chessboard than bits in a byte.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 64 squares vs 8 bits.

claims.statement: World Wide Web proposed happened before Penicillin discovered.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. World Wide Web proposed: 1989. Penicillin discovered: 1928.
